name: Beans with Thyme & Cashew Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the green beans.
2. Boil them in lightly salted water until they are just tender.
3. Drain the beans.
4. Heat the oil in a skillet over medium heat.
5. Put in the cashew nuts and stir until they are golden brown.
6. Remove from the skillet.
7. Increase the heat.
8. Add the beans and garlic to the skillet and stir until the garlic begins to brown.
9. Mix in the chopped nuts and thyme.
10. Turn off the heat.
